title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch USW-Pro-48
description: The USW-Pro-48 is a manageable Gigabit L2 switch with 48x Gigabit LAN ports and four SFP+ ports with a transfer rate of 10Gbps. In addition to the standard equipment, the switch also has a 1.3" touch screen for providing information about the system, temperature, port statistics and much more The USW-Pro-48 has no web management but is managed centrally using the UniFi Controller with support for the UniFi mobile application and offers an extensive set of advanced switching protocols and L2 functions, including operating mode (switching, mirroring or aggregation) per port. UniFi Network Controller and mobile applications allow administrators to configure and monitor virtually all graphical user interface functions from anywhere This generation of switches supports redundant power supply via a special connector to the UniFi SmartPower (sold separately) unit in the event of a failure of the primary power supply at the switch Device Power cord Rackmount ears
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (48) 10/100/1000Mbps Optical interfaces (4) 1G/10Gbps Other features Touchscreen Power Power type Mains power (230V), UniFi SmartPower RPS Redundant power supply Yes Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Rackmount Fans No Chassis design Metal Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Width [mm] 442 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 285 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 176 MAC address table 16000 Jumbo frame [Bytes] 9000
